name: Enchanted Grove
description: A circle of silver-barked trees glows with pale inner light. The grass within is impossibly green, and the air hums with a sound just below hearing.
dialogueOnInteract: You step into the grove and feel every ache and weariness lift from your body like morning mist. The trees seem to lean inward, sheltering you. A voice, neither male nor female, whispers through the leaves: 'Rest, pilgrim. The road is long, but you are not forgotten.'
